query:
SELECT 
  p.id as productId,
  p.sku as productSku,
  COUNT(pv.id) as variantCount,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1)) as skuPrefixes
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
WHERE pv.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.sku
HAVING p.sku != skuPrefixes
LIMIT 10;

  COUNT(pv.id) as variantCount,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1)) as skuPrefixes
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
WHERE pv.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.sku
HAVING p.sku != skuPrefixes
